summary: US forces struck 20 Iranian targets in three waves with most missiles intercepted and no reported casualties. Hezbollah seized weapons caches in southern Lebanon towns of Zawtar al‑Sharqiyah and Zawtar al‑Gharbiya. Iran’s foreign minister announced readiness to help resolve the conflict and condemned US attacks as violations of sovereignty.
key_points: US airstrikes hit 20 Iranian targets in three waves; officials say almost all missiles and drones were intercepted with no casualties reported (Source: @asafroz/50087).

Hezbollah forces operating north of the Litani River seized firearms, anti‑tank missiles, drones and other gear from civilian buildings in Zawtar al‑Sharqiyah and Zawtar al‑Gharbiya (Source: @manniefabian/58529).
Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson said Russia is ready to help resolve the conflict and condemned attacks on non‑military infrastructure (Source: @SharghDaily/164979).
Iranian air defense systems were activated in Tehran according to local reports (Source: @inon_yttach/8823).
A UAV was shot down over Jam, Bushehr province (Source: @SharghDaily/164980).
Hezbollah launched a rocket at Israeli troops in southern Lebanon that was intercepted by Israeli air defenses, triggering an early warning in Kiryat Shmona (Source: @manniefabian/58531).
Unverified reports claim multiple missile launches from Khomin and Ahvaz regions, with several rockets fired around 04:30‑04:37 local time (Source: @VahidOnline/76126).

sections.executive_summary: US airstrikes hit 20 Iranian targets with most missiles intercepted and no casualties reported. Hezbollah seized weapons caches in southern Lebanon towns north of the Litani River. Iran’s foreign ministry signaled willingness to assist in conflict resolution while condemning US actions.

points: US forces conducted three waves of strikes against 20 Iranian targets; Iranian officials claim nearly all missiles and drones were intercepted and no casualties occurred (Source: @asafroz/50087).
Iranian air defense systems were reported activated over Tehran, indicating heightened alert status (Source: @inon_yttach/8823).
Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson announced Russia’s readiness to help resolve the conflict and condemned attacks on non‑military infrastructure as unacceptable (Source: @SharghDaily/164979).
Unverified local messages reported multiple missile launches from Khomin and Ahvaz regions around 04:30‑04:37, describing several rockets fired (Source: @VahidOnline/76126).

Hezbollah forces operating north of the Litani River seized firearms, anti‑tank missiles, launchers and drones from civilian buildings in Zawtar al‑Sharqiyah and Zawtar al‑Gharbiya (Source: @manniefabian/58529).
A Hezbollah‑launched rocket at Israeli troops in southern Lebanon was intercepted by Israeli air defenses, triggering an early warning in Kiryat Shmona (Source: @manniefabian/58531).

The IDF investigated a gunman infiltration near the Lebanese border at Margaliot; the gunman was killed after a brief exchange of fire, with no additional attackers found (Source: @manniefabian/58530).
The Israeli Air Force bombed Hamas’s naval police headquarters in Khan Younis, killing several operatives including a cell commander (Source: @manniefabian/58521).
The Israeli Air Force struck Hamas’s naval police headquarters in the Khan Younis area, killing several terror operatives (Source: @manniefabian/58521).
IDF reports destroying three Hamas arms caches in Gaza after warning residents and engaging targets attempting to move weapons (Source: @manniefabian/58521).
Hezbollah seized weapons caches in Zawtar al‑Sharqiyah and Zawtar al‑Gharbiya, capturing firearms, anti‑tank missiles, drones and other gear (Source: @manniefabian/58529).
A Hezbollah rocket aimed at Israeli troops in southern Lebanon was intercepted, prompting an early warning in Kiryat Shmona (Source: @manniefabian/58531).
Israeli troops investigated a gunman infiltration near the border at Margaliot; the gunman was killed and no further threats were found (Source: @manniefabian/58530).
An Iranian Shahed‑136 UAV was observed over eastern Iraq, possibly heading to attack in the Kurdistan region (Source: @New_security8200/201537).

A cargo vessel off Balhaf, Yemen reported an encounter with a small boat carrying six armed individuals; the vessel’s security team exchanged fire and forced the boat to retreat (Source: @presstv/193431).

key_developments: US airstrikes targeted 20 Iranian sites in three waves, with most missiles and drones intercepted and no casualties reported (Source: @asafroz/50087).
Hezbollah seized firearms, anti‑tank missiles, drones and other weapons from civilian buildings in Zawtar al‑Sharqiyah and Zawtar al‑Gharbiya, south of the Litani River (Source: @manniefabian/58529).
Iran’s foreign ministry announced Russia’s willingness to help resolve the conflict and condemned US attacks as violations of sovereignty (Source: @SharghDaily/164979).
Iranian air defense systems were activated over Tehran, indicating heightened alert (Source: @inon_yttach/8823).
A Hezbollah‑launched rocket at Israeli troops in southern Lebanon was intercepted by Israeli air defenses, triggering an early warning in Kiryat Shmona (Source: @manniefabian/58531).
The IDF killed a gunman near the Lebanese border at Margaliot after a brief firefight; no additional attackers were found (Source: @manniefabian/58530).
An Iranian Shahed‑136 UAV was sighted over eastern Iraq, possibly en route to the Kurdistan region (Source: @New_security8200/201537).
sections.threat_assessment: Iran faces multi‑domain pressure from US airstrikes while maintaining defensive postures, including activated air defenses in Tehran. Hezbollah continues to acquire advanced weaponry in southern Lebanon, enhancing its capability to challenge Israeli forces. The presence of Iranian UAVs over Iraq suggests a potential expansion of aerial threats toward Kurdish areas, raising regional security concerns.
sections.regional_response: Israel is responding with targeted strikes against Hamas infrastructure in Gaza and heightened border security in Lebanon, including rapid neutralization of infiltrators. Gulf states remain vigilant, as evidenced by the armed encounter off Yemen’s coast, indicating broader maritime security concerns. Russia’s expressed readiness to mediate may influence diplomatic dynamics, though concrete actions remain unclear.
sections.intelligence_notes: Unverified local reports of multiple missile launches from Khomin and Ahvaz highlight possible escalation in Iran’s internal security environment. The interception of a Hezbollah rocket by Israeli air defenses demonstrates effective Israeli counter‑rocket capabilities but also underscores ongoing missile threats. Monitoring of Iranian UAV movements over Iraq is essential to anticipate potential cross‑border attacks.
